subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from the Wronged One unto him who hath attained unto divine knowledge, who hath acknowledged the oneness of God and confessed that which He hath revealed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: این کتابیست از مظلوم الی من فاز بالعرفان و اقر بتوحید الله و اعترف بما انزله
subcodes.subjects: @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @love and unity, @love of God
